name: Delivery Syria - Merchant App
description: An administration mobile portal for merchants to manage order creation, driver assignments, delivery status, and financials.
features: Fast, dynamic order creation and dispatching pipeline.
Real-time tracking of drivers currently handling merchant packages.
Comprehensive settlement dashboards with digital receipts.
Interactive notifications for order status changes (assigned, picked up, delivered).
my_role: Core Mobile Developer - Designed merchant management workflows capable of processing large numbers of incoming orders with real-time synchronization between merchants, drivers, and customers.
